featured.customDescription: Drop-seq single-cell sequencing QC tool — reduced manual inspection from 60 min/image to 30 sec/image using Python & OpenCV.
Auto-formats flow cytometry data into publication-ready N-by-N statistical plots using Python & VBA.
Auto-detects and crops gel electrophoresis bands, standardizing image format for publication.
LINE chatbot powered by Google Apps Script + Sheets with keyword fuzzy search for meme responses.
